content.en:
It was not difficult for Ye Tian to create the Ancestral Method, besides, the Ancestral Methods cultivated by Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Ye Yu were all created by him, so he completely understood their Ancestral Methods, and he only needed to create the corresponding Ancestral Methods according to his body and Ancestral Body combined with the rules of the foreign land.

And last time, Ye Tian had already created a batch of Ancestor Methods, fusing to create his own Endless Ancestor Methods.

Now, he only needed to change it slightly to fit them, and he could teach them these Native Ancestor Methods.

When the time comes, they will cultivate step by step, use the Exotic Ancestor Method to promote the Ancestor again, and after cultivating to the top Ancestor, they can combine the two Ancestor Methods and fuse them to become the strongest Ancestor.

In just a few dozen realm years, Ye Tian had created an ancestral method that was incomparably suitable for them based on the ancestral bodies of his relatives.

Subsequently, Ye Tian taught them the four ancestral methods one by one, guided them to practice, and provided them with a large number of resources.

Under Ye Tian's guidance and the supply of massive resources, Xiao Yue and the others used the Exotic Ancestor Method one by one to step into the Ancestor Realm again on the second path, and soon after, they re-entered the Ancestor Realm.

The two Ancestor Methods had all been raised to the Top Ancestor realm, and their strength had improved a lot, and they had already surpassed the other Top Ancestors.

Then, they raised all the two Ancestor Methods to the extreme of the Top Ancestor, and they only needed to fuse the two Ancestor Methods to impact the Supreme Ancestor Realm, becoming the Supreme Ancestor Realm that countless Ancestors dreamed of.

With Ye Tian's guidance, even if they were not self-founding ancestor methods, it wouldn't take too long to advance to the Supreme Ancestor realm.

If Ye Tian didn't help, they were afraid that they would need several dark calendars before they could be promoted to the Supreme Ancestor realm.

But with Ye Tian's guidance, there is no need for a dark calendar.

As the years passed, countless cultivators in the entire Dark Forbidden Domain began to get nervous, as the news of the Great Tribulation was transmitted.

Today's Dark Forbidden Domain is no longer the original Dark Forbidden Domain, the number of ancestors has increased tenfold, and the ancestors of the human race are even more, and they have reached three digits, among which there are many ancestors who have been promoted by the Founding Ancestor Method, and there are also ancestors who have been promoted by using Ye Tian's self-created Ancestor Method.

Hundreds of Ancestors, such a number is enough to make it difficult for any force to match.

Now the Terrans no longer take other forces seriously, and the Terrans only target other exotic worlds.

Moreover, the Terran has the resource point of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and can obtain a lot of resources from the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, so the Terran Ancestors have sufficient resources, and they have been promoted to the top Ancestor level one by one, and some have even surpassed the Destruction Ancestor and the Saint Ancestor.

Finally, when it was less than ten realm epochs away from the Great Tribulation, Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, took the lead in being promoted to the Supreme Ancestor.

Subsequently, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Ye Yu were successively promoted to the Supreme Ancestor.

At this point, the Terran race has four supreme ancestors.

If it is divided by forces, the Terran can be evaluated as a nominal-level force at the lowest, and with a strong man like Ye Tian, as long as he does not fall, even those name-level forces will not dare to offend the Terran.

......

this day.

Many leaders of forces outside of the Terran race started a meeting together, and the leaders of it were the Holy Sect of Destruction and the Holy Gate forces of the major dark holy lands, such as the Holy Ancestor.

Today's Destruction Ancestor, Time and Space Ancestor, Realm Ancestor, and Saint Ancestor are also much stronger than in the past, and they can be regarded as reaching the peak realm of the top Ancestors, not weaker than those Ancient Ancestors.

Unless they are the top ancestors with the strongest ancestors, they can be easily crushed.

And the Supreme Ancestor is like the Supreme Emperor Weapon of the Bone Clan, the value is incomparably high, even for the Supreme Ancestor, it is more precious.

Ye Tian destroyed the Haitian Holy Sect, and with the many materials he collected, he only refined a few Supreme Ancestral Artifacts in total.

Therefore, except for the human race, the other forces in the Dark Forbidden Domain do not have the Supreme Ancestor, so the Supreme Ancestor is a legend for them, and it is not counted in the regular combat power.

"Destroy the Ancestor, what is the main purpose of this meeting?The Great Tribulation is coming, although we have not experienced the Great Tribulation, but from the only information and information, the Great Tribulation is extremely terrifying, even for the First Ancestor, it is a life of nine deaths, we must be prepared!" asked a top Ancestor.

The Ancestor of Destruction smiled and said, "What are you going to prepare? When the catastrophe comes, our strength is like an ant, unless we are hiding, but even if we hide, it is easy to be found, almost depending on luck." If you're lucky, you can survive by hiding, and if you're unlucky, you'll be killed!"

"If we join forces, we may be able to survive!"

An elite ancestor proposed.

"Alliance? No matter how much we unite, we can't compete with a supreme ancestor, and when the catastrophe comes, how many strong people are at the level of the supreme ancestor, do you know? Those ancient ancestors who have survived a great tribulation still don't dare to come forward, for fear of revealing their hiding location. It's useless to unite, there are only two ways at the moment!"

"What's the solution?"

Many ancestors were curious.

Ancestor of Destruction said: "The first way is to take refuge in some foreign force, if they accept it, we will have hope of survival." The second way is to find a place that you think is very hidden, such as a special space-time node, and then use the ultimate ancestor skill of the concealment type, and if you are lucky, you will not be discovered. But the Supreme Ancestor is very powerful, and I can't say if I can hide it from the Supreme Ancestor. "

Take refuge?

These two methods, they didn't think about it, but no one said it.

Now, the Ancestor of Destruction has spoken.

"Neither of these methods is very reliable!" said one of the ancestors.

"Naturally it's unreliable, but there's no way, who made us too weak to be promoted to the Strongest Ancestor!" the Holy Ancestor sighed.

"What about the Terrans?"

Suddenly, an ancestor asked.

Terran?

Now there are many ancestors of the human race, and they are the most powerful, and the ancestors of the Ten Thousand Laws are even more mysterious, and they almost don't play with them anymore, and they still haven't seen the Ten Thousand Laws Ancestors for a long time.

It is rumored that the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws has reached the realm of the strongest ancestor, but it is impossible to be sure.

"Realm Ancestor, the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws is one of the ancestors of our Battle Gate, has he been promoted to the Supreme Ancestor, is the Terran Race sure that he will survive this catastrophe?"

The Realm Ancestor smiled bitterly: "The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws didn't contact us much a long time ago, although he used to be a member of the Battle Gate, but his core is in the Human Race, the Human Race is so powerful now, where do we dare to regard him as a member of the Battle Gate! "

The Holy Ancestor said: "Realm Ancestor, can you contact the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws and ask the Terran how to deal with this catastrophe? If the Terran is sure to survive the catastrophe, I am willing to join the Terran!"

"Yes, yes, we are willing to join the Terrans!"

One Ancestor hurriedly said.

When the catastrophe came, they were all afraid of death, so they all wanted to live.

"Let me ask!" said the Realm Ancestor helplessly.
